6.10Factor of Production - Capital生產要素 - 資本
Features特質: 
Used to help or replace other factors
capital is a man-made resource
increase productivity
E.g. ATM machine replaced bank tellers
用於幫助或替代其他因素
資本是一種人造資源
提升勞動生產力
例子： ATM 機取代了銀行出納員
Investment forgoes present consumption for more future consumption
Capital formation
Current consumption is forgone to have more future consumption (a kind of investment)
When interest rate increases, the cost of investment increases and the level of capital formation decreases.
E.g. An apple can be produced for present consumption or use its seed to plant an apple tree in order to have more future consumption. 
投資為了未來消費者而放棄當時消費
資本形成
放棄現在的消費是為了有更多的未來消費
   （一種投資）
當利率上升時，投資成本增加，資本形成水平下降。
例子：生產一個蘋果既可以拿來即時享用（當時消費），亦可以用它的種子種植一棵蘋果樹，以便將來有更多的消費（未來消費）。
Change in capital stock股本變動
6.11Factor of Production - Land生產要素 - 土地
Characteristics of Land土地特徵
Fixed in supply (i.e. When price increases, the quantity supplied will remains unchanged)
That means supply c

pplied will remains unchanged)
That means supply cannot be increased or decreased?
固定的供應（即當價格上升時，供應量將保持不變）
這是否意味供應不可以增加或減少呢？
The supply cannot be artificially increase (i.e. cannot increase by human effort), however, may be increased by natural force.
供應不能人為增加（即不能靠人力增加），但可以靠自然力量增加。
No opportunity cost in producing it (it is a gift of nature)
Since it is not produced by human, we do not need to forgo anything
Any cost in using it?
生產它沒有機會成本（這是大自然的禮物）
因為它不是人類生產的，所以我們不需要放棄任何東西。
使用它有什麼成本嗎？
Anything that has gone through a production process will become capital 
Wild animals are LAND, Animals in Ocean Park is CAPITAL

7.3Public Enterprise and Private Enterprise 公營企業及私營企業
Firms 廠商：
Also known as an enterprise 也稱為企業
It is a planning unit of production where people make production decisions (regarding the employment of factors of production and the production of goods and services) 
它是生產的計劃單位，人們在其中做出生產決策（關於生產要素的使用以及商品和服務的生產）

ited Company有限公司

7.4Features of Public Enterprise 公營企業的特點
Government departments 政府部門
Owned, managed and financed by the government 由政府擁有、管理和資助
Aims to provide public services to society at a low price 旨在以低廉價格向社會提供公共服務
E.g. Fire Services Department, Water Supplies Department, Hongkong Post例如 消防處、水務署、香港郵政
Public Corporation 公營公司
Solely owned by the government 政府獨資
Financially independent of the government財務上獨立於政府
(may be heavily subverted by the government)(可能得到政府的大力資助)
Managed by a board of directors appointed by the government 由政府任命的董事會管理
It aims to make profit 以盈利為目的
E.g. Airport Authority (of Hong Kong), The Consumer Council, Hong Kong Science and Technology Parks Corporation 例如: 香港機場管理局、消費者委員會、香港科技園公司
Aims of setting up public corporation
設立公營公司的目的：
To provide specific public services according to the com

metadata.source: Ch7 Forms of Business Ownership NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
vide specific public services according to the commercial principles (e.g. cost minimization) 
依照商業原則（例如成本最小化）提供特定的公共服務
To provide supervisory/advisory services of the government
提供政府的監督/諮詢服務
Advantages 優點 :
Government has a better control of the price 政府對價格有較好的控制
reduce the price to relieve the burden of the general public 降低物價，減輕大眾負擔
Easily to get loans (as it is owned and supported by the government) 容易獲得貸款（因為它是由政府擁有和支持的）
Disadvantages 缺點 :
Management is less efficient 管理效率較低
The decision is less sensitive to price signal 決策對價格訊號較不敏感
7.5Features of Private Enterprise 私營企業的特徵
1.Liability 責仼
Unlimited liability 
Liability is not restricted / not confined to the investment in business, when the firm liquidate, owners need to sell personal property / assets to repay debts
無限責任:
責任不受限制 / 不限於商業投資，當公司清算時，業主需要出售個人財產 / 資產來償還債務
Limited liability 
Liability is restricted / confined to the investment in the business
有限責任:
責任僅限於業務投資
2.Legal Entity 
Firm and owners are separate under the law, the firm can own properties

metadata.source: Ch7 Forms of Business Ownership NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
eparate under the law, the firm can own properties, take legal action just as a person. 
(When a firm has a separate legal status under the law  it has limited liability, vice versa!)
法人:
根據法律規定，公司和所有者是分開的，公司可以擁有財產，可以像個人一樣採取法律行動。
(當一家公司根據法律具有獨立的法人地位時，它承擔有限責任，反之亦然！)
3.Collective responsibility 
- Decision made by one partner is legally bore on all other partners  
集體責任：
合夥人所做的決定對所有其他合夥人具有法律效力
***DSE Reminder: Co-existence of limited liability and legal entity‼
***DSE Reminder: 有限責任與法人並存‼

Can freely transfer its share on owners’ will.
Bear risk of being taken over

可以依所有者的意願自由轉讓其股份

7.9More About Shares and Bonds 有關股票和債券的更多信息
Firms may not have enough capital to operate, and thus, they need to raise the capital. The limited companies will usually be issuing shares and bonds:
企業可能沒有足夠的資金來運營，因此需要籌集資金。 有限公司通常會發行股票和債券：
From the perspective of company 從公司角度：
Advantages of issuing shares over debentures/bonds 發行股票相對於債券的優勢
No interest burden (company may choose to either distribute the dividends or not, or depends on the business performance) 
No redemption obligations
無利息負擔 (公司可依經營績效選擇是否有派息)
無贖回義務
Disadvantage of issuing shares over debentures / bonds 發行股票相對於債券的缺點
Higher risk of being taken over (shareholders can freely transfer their shares in the stock exchange without the consent of board of directors) 
Controlling power of existing shareholders is diluted (as new shareholders will also have the voting rights)
Such disadvantage does not apply on the listed companies adopting a system called ‘dual-class share structure’ (同股不同權), which

metadata.source: Ch7 Forms of Business Ownership NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
alled ‘dual-class share structure’ (同股不同權), which means the weighted voting rights -- the existing shareholders will be entitled more votes while the new investors will only be entitled 1 vote.
被接管風險較高（股東可在證券交易所自由轉讓其股份，無須董事會同意）
現有股東的控制權被稀釋（新股東也將擁有投票權）
這並不適用於採用「雙層股權結構」制度的上市公司，「雙層股權結構」意味著不同投票權 - 現有股東將擁有更多投票權，而新投資者只有一票投票權。
From the perspective of investor/holders 從投資者 / 持有者的角度來看:
Advantages of buying shares over debentures / bonds
Have voting rights at shareholders’ meeting 
購買股票相對於債券的優勢
在股東會上有表決權
Disadvantage of buying shares over debentures/bonds 
Unstable return / more risky - May not have dividend when the company suffer a loss / decide not to pay
Higher risk since the company need to repay to the bondholders before shareholders once liquidates
購買股票相對於債券的缺點
回報不穩定 / 風險較大 - 當公司虧損 / 決定不派息時，可能不會發放股息
一旦清算，公司需要在股東之前向債券持有人償還債務，風險較高

(可在證券交易所交易)
     
Lasting continuity 
The continuity will not be affected by the death, bankruptcy, or withdrawal of any shareholder
    持久連續性
連續性不會因任何股東死亡、破產或退出而受到影響
Higher efficiency in management 
Large firm can practice greater scope of specialization 
Professional managers can be employed to manage the firm 
管理效率更高
大公司可以實行更大範圍的專業化
可以聘請職業經理人來管理公司
Transfer of ownership is easier 
Share can be transferred easily especially for listed company 
所有權轉移更容易
股份轉讓容易，尤其是上市公司

Longer time is making decision 
Structure is more complicated; proposals have to discuss in the meeting

結構較複雜；提案必須在會議上討論
Higher profit tax rate 
較高的利得稅率
Lower working incentive 
The manager is not the one of the owners, they may not have stro

chunks.text:
not the one of the owners, they may not have strong incentive to maximize profit

管理者不是所有者之一，他們可能沒有強烈的動機來最大化利潤
Disclosure of financial statement (for listed company) 
Competitors have more information about the firm
財務報表揭露 (上市公司)
競爭對手擁有更多有關該公司的信息
Relationship between owner and employee is not close 
Owner may not know much about the employee 
老闆與員工關係不密切
老闆可能不太了解員工

chunks.text:
_________________________________________
Marking Scheme:
(a)- Shares of a listed company are freely transferrable while shares of a private limited company are not.
- A listed company is required to disclose the accounting information to the public while a private limited company is not.
- A listed company can issue shares and bonds to the general public while a private limited company cannot.(@1)
(b)Arguments supporting the suggestion:
- Government will have a better control of the price so that it may reduce the price to relieve the burden of the passengers
- MTR may be easier to get loans as it is fully owned and supported by the government. (@2)
Arguments opposing the suggestion:
- It may make the management less efficient/less sensitive to price signal.
- The money involved in the purchase is substantial, which may have better alternative uses such as education and medical service.(@2)
(a) - 上市公司的股票是自由買賣的，而私人有限公司的股票則不是。
- 上市公司須向公眾披露其會計資料，而私人有限公司則不需要。
- 上市公司可以向公眾發行股票和債券，而私人有限公司則不可。
(b)支持該建議的論點：
- 政府可更有效控

metadata.source: Ch7 Forms of Business Ownership QB (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
市公司可以向公眾發行股票和債券，而私人有限公司則不可。
(b)支持該建議的論點：
- 政府可更有效控制港鐵票價，它可以自由地減低票價减輕乘客的負擔。
- 若港鐵由政府全資擁有及支持，港鐵可能較容易獲取貸款為其營運或投資融資。
反對該建議的論點：
- 這可能令港鐵的管理變得欠缺效率及對市場（價格）的訊息不敏感。
- 購買港鐵所涉及的金額龐大，政府將該筆款項用在其他方面（如教育和醫療）可能更佳。

因解釋彼德為什麼轉變其廠商的商業擁有權以擴展業務。(2)

Chapter 8 _ The Growth of Firm & Market Structure
Definition List定義列表
8.3The Growth of Firm公司的擴張
The firm may expand its production scale by different methods which are generally categorized into 2 types/ 
企業可以通過不同的方式擴大生產規模，一般分為兩類：
Internal expansion
External expansion / integration
Internal expansion
Expanding the business within its existing structure 
  Existing firm expands its own scale 
  Usually only including one firm 
1.  內部擴張
在現有結構內擴展業務
  現有公司擴大自身規模
  通常只包括一家公司
E.g. 
McDonald open one more McDonald in another place in Hong Kong
MTR opened a new line named ‘Tuen Ma line’ and expand its services to Kai Tak
例子： 
麥當勞在香港另一個地方再開一家麥當勞
港鐵開通「屯馬線」，擴展服務至啟德
External expansion / integration
  A firm was combining with other firms 
 Existing firm expands its own scale with  other firms 
Usually including two firms or more / whole industry 
2.  外部擴張 / 合併
一家公司正在與其他公司合併
 現有公司與其他公司一起擴大自己的規模
通常包括兩家或更多公司 / 整個行業
E.g. 
Toridoll Holdings taking over Tamjai
MTR merging with KCR in 2007
Facebook taking ov

metadata.source: Ch8 The Growth of Firm NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
ai
MTR merging with KCR in 2007
Facebook taking over WhatsApp
例子： 
東利多控股有限公司收購譚仔
2007年港鐵與九廣鐵路合併
臉書收購WhatsApp
8.3The Growth of Firm公司的擴張
Types of expansion / integration 擴張 / 合併的類型
Horizontal
Expand its business at the same production stage of the same type of products
E.g.  
Cathay Pacific Ltd. takes over Hong Kong Dragon Airline Ltd.
1.  橫向
在同類產品的同一生產階段拓展業務
例子：
國泰航空接管港龍航空。
Vertical backward
Expand its business to the preceding stage of production
E.g.  
The Garden Company Ltd. takes over flour manufacturer 
a bus company takes over a petroleum firm
a restaurant expands with a farmland for cattle
2.  縱向（後向）
業務拓展至生產前段
例子：  
嘉頓有限公司收購麵粉工廠 
一家巴士公司接管了一家石油公司
一家餐廳擴建了一片養牛的農田
Vertical forward
Expand its business to the next stage of production
E.g.
A flour manufacturer takes over the Garden Company Ltd
a car manufacturer takes over automobile retailer
a garment factory takes over a fashion shop
3.  縱向（前向）
業務拓展至生產後段
例子：
麵粉工廠收購嘉頓有限公司
汽車製造商接管汽車零售商
一家服裝廠接管了一家時裝店
Lateral
Expands into a business of related but not competiti

metadata.source: Ch8 The Growth of Firm NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
pands into a business of related but not competitive products
E.g. 
Newspaper publisher starts to publish a magazine / Tutorial school also publishes textbooks
Google takes over YouTube / Facebook takes over Instagram 
McDonald’s has expanded its business by operating McCafe 
MTR Corporation Limited takes over the Kowloon-Canton Railway Corporation 
Truck manufacturer in Japan expands his business to private cars production 
Shoe factory takes over a handbag factory / Butter company takes over a cheese company
Café de Coral takes over Spaghetti House**
A telephone company combines with a telegram company
Walt Disney Company which produced cartoon movies only. Later it expanded its business to owning and operating Disney and theme parks and hotels
Remarks: When you are doing MCQ, please pay attention to the wordings that the question have given, e.g.: 2017 PI Q9
Giordano International Limited is a retailer of casual wear. It has launched the Giordano Ladies, which provides luxury clothes and suits for ladies.

metadata.source: Ch8 The Growth of Firm NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
ich provides luxury clothes and suits for ladies. It is an example of _________ expansion.
horizontal
vertical
lateral
conglomerate
The answer to this question is C. As causal wear and luxury clothes are related but not competitive products. Some students may misinterpret that they are both selling clothes / related to ‘wear’ = horizontal expansion, but the point is that they targeted at different type of customer, so they are regarded as related but not competitive products.
**For example, once Café de Coral takes over Spaghetti House, they are both selling food/related to gourmet, but the former provides the fast food while the latter provides western cuisines, so they are regarded as related but not competitive products.
4.  側向
擴展到相關但非競爭產品的業務
例子： 
報紙出版商開始出版雜誌 / 補習社也出版教科書
谷歌接管 YouTube / 臉書接管 Instagram 
麥當勞通過經營 McCafe 擴大業務 
香港鐵路有限公司接管九廣鐵路公司 
日本卡車製造商將業務擴展至私家車生產 
鞋廠接手袋廠 / 牛油製造商接手芝士製造商
大家樂接手意粉屋**
電話公司與電報公司合併
只製作卡通電影的華特迪士尼公司。後來將業務擴展到擁有和經營迪士尼、主題公園和酒店
備註：當你做選擇題的時候，請細心留意題目提供的字眼，例： 2017 PI Q9
佐丹奴國際有限公司是一間便服零售商。它開設了佐

metadata.source: Ch8 The Growth of Firm NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
請細心留意題目提供的字眼，例： 2017 PI Q9
佐丹奴國際有限公司是一間便服零售商。它開設了佐丹奴女裝Giordano Ladies，提供高級女士服裝和套裝。這是_________ 擴張的一個例子。
A.  橫向
B.  縱向
C.  側向
D.  集團
題目的答案是 C. 因為休閒服和奢侈服裝是相關的但不是競爭產品。有的同學可能會誤會他們都是賣衣服 / 跟‘穿’相關 = 橫向擴張，重點是他們針對的是不同類型的客戶，所以算是相關產品，不是競爭產品。
**比如大家樂收購意粉館後，都是賣食品 / 美食相關的，但前者提供的是快餐，後者提供的是西餐，所以屬於相關但不是競爭產品。
5.  Conglomerate
Expands into a business of unrelated products
E.g. 
759 Store is a local chain shop selling snacks, groceries, home appliances and personal care product. It opened a wonton noodle shop (759 Wonton Noodle)
City Telecom (HK) Limited enter paid TV market
Summary of the growth of firm
Internal Growth
(Internal Expansion)
(Or simply called ‘Expansion’)
Expanding within its existing structure
External Growth
(External Expansion) (Integration)
Combine with another firm
Horizontal
Expand the production of the same goods or services
Combine (integrate) (merge) with/take over firm that produce at the same production stage
Lateral
Produce products or services that are related to existing product, but not directly com

metadata.source: Ch8 The Growth of Firm NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
related to existing product, but not directly competitive
Combine (integrate) (merge) with/take over firm that produce the related but not directly competitive product
Vertical Backward
Produce products or services that is at its preceding stage of production
Combine (integrate) (merge) with/take over firm that at its preceding stage of production
Vertical Forward
Production products or services that is at its later stage of production
Combine (integrate) (merge) with/take over firm that its later stage of production
Conglomerate
Produce products or services that are unrelated to existing product
Combine (integrate) (merge) with/take over firm that produce unrelated product
5.  集團
擴展到不相關產品的業務
例子： 
759 Store是一家本地連鎖店，銷售零食、雜貨、家電和個人護理產品。它開了一家餛飩麵店（759 Wonton Noodle）
城市電訊（香港）有限公司進入付費電視市場
企業擴張總結
內部擴張
（內部擴展）
（或簡稱為“擴展”)
在現有結構中擴展
外部擴張
（外部擴張） (整合)
與另一家公司合併
橫向
擴大相同商品或服務的生產
結合（整合）（合併）與 / 接管在同一生產階段生產的公司
側向
生產與現有產品相關但不直接競爭的產品或服務
結合（整合）（合併）與 / 接管生產相關但不直接競爭產品的公司
縱向後向
生產處於前一生產階段的產品或服務
結合（整合）（合併）與 / 接管處於生產前一階段的公司
縱向前向
處於後期生產階段

metadata.source: Ch8 The Growth of Firm NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
階段的產品或服務
結合（整合）（合併）與 / 接管處於生產前一階段的公司
縱向前向
處於後期生產階段的生產產品或服務
結合（整合）（合併）與 / 接管處於生產後一階段的公司
集團
生產與現有產品不相關的產品或服務
結合（整合）（合併）/ 接管生產不相關產品的公司
8.4Motives of Expansion / Integration擴張 / 合併的動機
TYPES種類
MOTIVES動機
Horizontal
橫向
Reduce number of competitors (for integration only)
Enlarge market share to have more influence on market price
1. 減少競爭對手數量（僅用於合併）
2.  擴大市場份額，對市場價格有更大的影響力
Vertical Backward
縱向後向
Ensure stable supply of raw materials
確保原材料穩定供應
Vertical Forward
縱向前向
Ensure stable sales outlet for products
Easier to collect market information
1. 保證產品穩定的銷售渠道
2. 更容易收集市場信息
Lateral側向
Spread risk through product diversification
通過產品多樣化分散風險
Conglomerate集團
General Motives通用動機
Enjoy economies of scale and reduce average production cost
Extension of goodwill
 Extend the established brand name and goodwill to new product
Utilize resources more fully and efficiently as the two lines of business can share some of their resources
1.  享受規模經濟，降低平均生產成本
2.  商譽 / 聲譽的延伸
    將已建立的品牌名稱和商譽 / 聲譽擴展到新產品
3.  兩個業務線可以共享部分資源，更充分、更有效地利用資源
Remarks備註：

metadata.source: Ch8 The Growth of Firm NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
譽擴展到新產品
3.  兩個業務線可以共享部分資源，更充分、更有效地利用資源
Remarks備註：
Is expansion guarantee that the company must have a bigger profit after such change?
擴張是否保證公司在這種變化後一定有更大的利潤？
8.5Competition and Market Structure競爭與市場結構
Market: Exists whenever buyers and sellers come into contract for transaction
市場：只要買賣雙方達成交易，合約 (契約) 就存在
Product Market:
transaction of goods and services 
產品市場：
商品和服務的交易 
Factor Market: 
transaction of factor of production
生產要素市場：
生產要素的交易
Competition: Used to allocate the resource 
Price competition
Non-price competition (e.g. first-come first-served, by seller’s preferences, violence, talent, draw…)
競爭：用於分配資源
價格競爭
非價格競爭（例如先到先得、按賣家偏好、暴力、人才、抽獎……）
Market Information:
Perfect Information
Knowing the exact quantity seller have and consumer want, all producer’s selling price, quality, quantity… (Both consumers and sellers have the information of the seller, competitors)
Imperfect Information
Not knowing the exact quantity seller have and consumer want, all producer’s selling price, quality, quantity… (Both consumers

metadata.source: Ch8 The Growth of Firm NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
selling price, quality, quantity… (Both consumers and sellers do not have the information of the seller, competitors)
市場資訊：
完全訊息 / 完全資訊
知道賣家擁有量和消費者想要的確切數量，所有生產者的銷售價格，質量，數量......（消費者和賣家同時具備賣家和競爭對手的信息）
不完全訊息 / 不完全資訊
不知道賣家擁有的確切數量和消費者想要的數量，所有生產商的售價、質量、數量……（消費者和賣家都沒有賣家或競爭對手的信息）

Heterogenous product = because of different sizes, colors, tastes, after-sale services

巨大的進入成本，必要資源 / 技術的所有權

8.6Perfect Competitive Market完全競爭市場
A perfect competitive market has the following features:
Selling homogenous products
Perfect market in

metadata.source: Ch8 The Growth of Firm NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
res:
Selling homogenous products
Perfect market information
No price and non-price competition
In DSE exams, the question paper will ask you to explain why a certain market is not engaged in perfect information, please refer to the features mentioned above to explain.
完全競爭市場具有以下特徵：
1.  銷售同質產品
2.  完全市場信息
3.  無價格和非價格競爭
在DSE考試中，試卷會要求你解釋為什麼某個市場不從事完全信息，請參考上面提到的特點來解釋。
8.7Market Structure - Monopoly市場結構—壟斷
Features of Monopoly
Still need to face competition / Compete with substitutes
壟斷的特點
仍需面對競爭 / 與替代品競爭
Sources of monopoly power
Government franchise
When government grants a franchise to a firm, the firm is granted an exclusive right to produce a good or services
E.g. MTR or bus services
壟斷能力的來源
1.  政府專營權
當政府授予一家公司特許經營權時，該公司就被授予生產該商品或服務的專有權
例如港鐵或巴士服務
Patent (for invention) and copyright (for writer)
When someone has invented a new product, he can apply for patent, so that he can have exclusive right on it
2.  專利（發明）和版權（作者）
當某人發明了一種新產品時，他可以申請專利，這樣他就可以獨佔生產該產品的權利
Natural Monopoly
When the firm average cost of producti

metadata.source: Ch8 The Growth of Firm NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
al Monopoly
When the firm average cost of production drops and thus its output level increases, it enjoyed economies of scale, this kind of monopoly is called a natural monopoly
3.  自然壟斷
當企業產出水平提高時，平均生產成本下降，就享有規模經濟，這種壟斷稱為自然壟斷
Limited Market Demand
A single seller can provide enough quantity to satisfy market demand 
4.  市場需求有限
單個賣家已經可以提供足夠的數量來滿足市場需求 
8.7Market Structure - Monopoly市場結構 - 壟斷
Exclusive ownership of essential resources
Water Supplies Department
5.  獨家擁有重要資源
例如水務署
Government Ownership
Government owns the industry, no sellers are allowed to enter
6.  政府所有權
政府擁有該行業，不允許賣家進入
8.8Price Differentiation價格差異化
In daily life, we often discovered that identical goods are often sold at different prices in different stores. 
E.g., 7-eleven selling 375 mL Vita Lemon Tea at $7.8, while Circle K selling it at $6.5.
The reasons are
They are heterogenous products, or they provided differentiated services
There is imperfect market information
The firms have different production cost

長期生產&短期生產

st
定義列表
1. Law of Diminishing marginal return 
In short run, when more and more variable factors are added to a fixed factor, the marginal product of the variable factor will eventually decrease, holding technology constants.
1.邊際回報遞減定律 
在短期生產中，假設其他因素（生產技術），而越來越多的可變要素加入到固定要素中時，可變要素的邊際產量最終會下降。
2. Economies of scale
In Long run, when production scale increases,
the average cost decreases.
2. 規模經濟
在長期，當生產規模擴大，平均成本下降。

Chapter 9 _ Production in Long Run & Short Run
9.3Production in Long Run & Short Run短期生產&長期生產
Fixed factor:
Quantities remain unchanged when output change 
(E.g. monthly rental cost of a restaurant)
***Fixed cost vs Fixed factor
Variable factor:
Quantities change when output change
(E.g. number of the part-time staff in a restaurant)
Long Run: Involves only variable factors 
Short Run: Involves at least one fixed factor and variable factors
固定要素:
產出改變時，數量維持不變 
(E.g. 餐廳的月租成本)
***固定成本 vs 固定要素
可變要素:
產出改變時，數量隨之改變
(E.g. 餐廳的兼職員工數目)
長期: 只有可變要素 
短期: 有至少一個固定要素，及可變要素
Fixed Factor 固定要素
Variable Factor 可變要素
Short Run 短期
Yes (At least one)
Yes 有
Long Run 長期
No 無
Yes 有
* Short run and long run are not defined by the length of the time period but the existence of fixed factors
* 短期與長期並取決於時間長短，而是固定要素存在與否。
9.4Law of Diminishing Marginal Returns邊際回報遞減定律
Definition: 
In short run, when more and more variable factors are added to a fixed factor, the margina

e factors are added to a fixed factor, the marginal product of the variable factor will eventually decrease, holding technology constants. 
定義 
在短期生產中，假設其他因素（生產技術），當越來越多可變要素被投入至固定要素時，可變要素的邊際產量最終會下降。
Marginal product is the change in total amount of output produced by an additional unit of a variable factor. 
=Total Product2 – Total Product1
邊際產量是在投入額外一個單位的可變要素後，總產量的改變。
=總產量2 – 總產量1
Marginal product may initially increase, but it must eventually decrease.
邊際產量最初可能會上升，但最終必定會下跌。

9.6Production in Long Run長期生產
Internal vs External
Internal: Arise when a firm itself enlarge its scale of production.
External: Arise when other firm or entire industry enlarge its scale of production.
Optimal scale
The long run average cost is at a minimum level
Economies of scale vs Diseconomies of scale:
Economies of scale: Average cost decrease when produce more quantity of output
Diseconomies of scale; Average cost increase when produce more quantity of output
1.  內部 vs外部
內部：當一間廠商擴展其規模時出現
外部：當其他廠商或整個行業擴展其規模時出現
2.  最優規模
長期平均成本處於最低點
3.  規模經濟vs規模負經濟
規模經濟： 
當產出數量上升，平均成本下跌
規模負經濟： 
當產出數量上升，平均成本上升
9.7Internal & External / Economies & Diseconomies of Scale
內部 & 外部 / 規模經濟 & 規模負經濟
Reason for internal economies of scale
內部規模經濟的原因 
1. Technical economies
The scale of production increases, the firm can utilize its machine fully and afford more advanced

tilize its machine fully and afford more advanced machines. Thus, productivity can be raised and the average cost drops.
1. 技術規模經濟 
生產規模增加，廠商可以充分利用其機器並購買更先進的機器，因此生產力提升，平均成本下跌。
2. Managerial economies
A larger firm with a wider scope of specialization can raise productivity. Thus, productivity can be raised and the average cost drops.
2. 管理規模經濟 
專業化範圍更廣的公司可以提高生產力，因此提高生產力提升，平均成本下跌。
3. Financial economies
Cost of borrowing decreases because a larger firm may be able to obtain loans at a lower interest rate due to availability of collaterals. Thus, the average cost drops.
3. 財政規模經濟 
借貸成本降低，因為規模較大的廠商可能由於有較多可用抵押品而能夠以較低的利率獲得貸款。因此，平均成本下降。
4. Purchasing economies
Cost of buying raw materials decreases because a larger firm may be able to obtain discounts when buying raw materials in bulk. Thus, the average cost drops.
4. 採購規模經濟 
購買原材料的成本降低，因為規模較大的廠商在批量購買原材料時可能會獲得折扣。因此，平均成本下降。
Reason for internal economies of scale
內部規模經濟的原因 
5. Marketing economies
Marketing cost such as making advertisement can be spread over a larger

s making advertisement can be spread over a larger output. Thus, the average cost drops.
5. 營銷經濟 
製作廣告等營銷成本可以分攤到更大的產出上。因此，平均成本下降。 
6. Research and development economies:
The cost on research and development can be spread over a larger output. Thus, the average cost drops.
6. 研發經濟： 
研發成本可以分攤到更大的產出上。因此，平均成本下降。
Reason for internal diseconomies of scale
內部規模負經濟的原因 
1. Managerial diseconomies
Cost of management increases because the firm may become too large in scale and management efficiency is lowered. Thus, the average cost increases.
1. 管理規規模負經濟 
管理成本增加，因為廠商可能規模過大，管理效率降低。因此，平均成本增加。 
2. Financial diseconomies
Cost of further borrowing increases because the firm may have large outstanding loans already. Thus, the average cost increases.
2. 金融規模負經濟 
進一步借貸的成本增加，因為廠商可能已經有大量未償還貸款。因此，平均成本增加。
3. Marketing diseconomies
Marketing cost increases because the market may be saturated and additional promotion programmes need to be launched. Thus, the average cost increases.
3. 營銷規模負經濟 
營銷成本增加，因為市場可能已經飽和，需要推出額外的促銷計劃。因此，平均成本增加

. 營銷規模負經濟 
營銷成本增加，因為市場可能已經飽和，需要推出額外的促銷計劃。因此，平均成本增加。
Reason for external economies of scale
外部規模經濟的原因 
More experienced and qualified workers will be attracted to the region. Thus, the average cost decreases as the cost of recruiting skilled workers decreases.
該地區將吸引更多有經驗和有能力的勞工。因此，平均成本隨著招聘熟練勞工的成本下降而下降。 
More people will know about the industry and its product as the region is famous for ___________. Thus, the average cost decreases as the cost of advertising decreases.
由於該地區因 __________ 而聞名，更多人了解該行業及其產品。因此，平均成本隨著廣告成本的降低而降低。 
The demand for back-up, transport and communication services increases, corresponding services will be developed. This lowers the firm’s cost of using these services. The average cost drops.
後勤、運輸和通信服務需求增加，相關的服務會有發展。這降低了公司使用這些服務的成本。平均成本下降。
Reason for external diseconomies of scale
外部規模負經濟的原因 
Marketing cost increases because the market may be saturated and new markets or new products have to be developed. Thus, the average cost increases.
營銷成本增加，因為市場可能已經飽和，需要開發新市場或新產品。因此，平均成本增加。
Excessive

營銷成本增加，因為市場可能已經飽和，需要開發新市場或新產品。因此，平均成本增加。
Excessive expansion of an industry brings a huge demand for inputs, like labour, factories, raw materials and machines. The input prices increase. Thus, the average cost increases.
一個行業的過度擴張帶來了對勞工、工廠、原材料和機器等投入的巨大需求。投入品價格上漲。因此，平均成本增加。

-The cost of advertising can be shared by a larger number of students.
-The firm may be able to obtain loans at a lower interest rate after expansion (due to availability of
collaterals).
-Better experts can be hired to manage the group to increase productivity.
etc…
Type 3: 規模經濟
1.

oup to increase productivity.
etc…

-擴張後的廠商可能由於有較多可用抵押品而能夠以較低的利率獲得貸款。
-可以聘請更好的專家管理團隊以增加生產力etc…

廣告的成本可以由大量的學生攤分

(b)The law states that (holding technology constant,) when more units of a variable factor are added succe

en more units of a variable factor are added successively to a given quantity of fixed factors, the marginal products of this factor will eventually diminish.(3)
Yes, When labour increases from 3 to 4 units, the marginal product of labour drops from 18 to 14 units, so the law of diminishing returns holds.    (3)
該定論寫出(若技術維持不變)，當更多的可變要素持續加到某特定數額的固定要素，該可變要素的邊際產量最終會下降。                                   (3)
是，當勞力由3單位增加至4單位，勞力的邊際產出便由18單位下降到14單位，故此邊際回報遞減定律成立。                                                   (3)

ienced and skilled workers, as more of these workers would be attracted to the region.

Elaboration of the curriculum contents
Fine-tunings
Market and Price  
Consumer and producer surplus 
(i) Marginal benefit to consumers, willingness to pay, consumer surplus, demand curve and their relationship
(ii) Marginal cost of firms, minimum supply-price, producer surplus, supply curve and their relationship
(iii)Illustrate consumer surplus and producer surplus in a demand-supply diagram
(N.B. Concepts of utility, marginal rate of substitution, and indifference curves NOT required) 
 Students are expected to(i) state the definition of consumer surplus, and(ii) show consumer surplus on a (supply-) demand diagram. 
Students are expected to treat “willingness to pay” as the same as “marginal benefit” to consumers. 
Students are NOT expected to grasp the methods for extracting consumer surplus. 
[Note: The term “willingness to pay” is used in the curriculum. The term “marginal use value” is NOT recommended.] 
 Students are expected to 
(i)  state the definition of producer surplus, and 
(ii)  show

Definition List定義列表
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
Chapter 10 _ Consumer Surplus & Producer Surplus
10.3Benefit to a Consumer對消費者的好處
The benefit from consumption 
= The maximum willingness to pay 
消費利益
= 最大支付意願
Example:
Suppose Suki is very hungry, so she is interested in b

metadata.source: Ch10 Consumer Surplus and Producer Surplus NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
ose Suki is very hungry, so she is interested in buying a cup noodle.
For the 1st cup, her willingness to pay = $20
For the 2nd cup, her willingness to pay = $15
For the 3rd cup, her willingness to pay = $9
For the 4th cup, her willingness to pay = $0
Therefore, we can conclude that, the benefit of having the first cup noodle is $20.
例子：
假設舒淇肚子很餓，所以她打算買一個杯麵。
對於第一杯，她的最大支付意願為 20元
對於第二杯，她的最大支付意願為 15元

對於第四杯，她的最大支付意願為 0 元
所以我們能夠得出結論：
購買第一個杯麵的利益是20元。

固定成本 (FC):

不可避免，沉沒成本
不會影響決策

總固定成本 + 總可變成本

Since Fixed Cost incur regardless of output, we will produce when we receive any amount greater than or equal to the additional variable cost to produce the next unit.

E.g. Rent $1000, Salary $200 (will be ignored, won’t affect decision making)

Demand curve shows the relationship between price and quantity demanded. 
MB > Price → Consume more can gain
MB = Price → Still consume this unit 
MB < Price → Consume less can gain
To maximize consumer surplus, the consumer will consume unit where MB = P

邊際利益 < 價格 → 消費更少可以獲益
為了最大化消費者盈餘，消費者會持續消費至到邊際利益 = 價格的單位

提供優質、安全、環保的產品
確保勞工福利
為殘疾人提供就業機會
滿足社會的願望和道德標準
增加商譽
10.8Total Social Surplus and Marginal Social Surplus總社會盈餘和邊際社會盈餘
Total Social Surplus (TSS)= Consumer Surplus + Producer Surplus (CS + PS) 
Marginal Social Surplus (MSS)= Marginal Benefit – Marginal Cost 
總社會盈餘 (TSS)= 消費者盈餘 + 生產者盈餘 (CS + PS) 
邊際社會盈餘 (MSS)= 邊際利益 – 邊際成本
Total social surplus is MAXMIZED
When MB = MC and no additional Social surplus can attain
Efficiency is attained
總社會盈餘已最大化
當邊際利益 = 邊際成本且無法獲得額外的社會盈餘時
達到效率
*** DSE Reminder:
Case 1: When CS > PS or PS > CS 
it may still lead to a maximized TSS
案例一：當消費者盈餘 > 生產者盈餘 或生產者盈餘> 消費者盈餘 
它可能仍然會導致最大化的總社會盈餘
Case 2: CS = PS may not imply a maximized TSS 
Since they may not be maximized
案例二：消費者盈餘 = 生產者盈餘未必能夠實行總社會盈餘最大化
因為它們可能並未最大化
Case 3: When CS is maximized,
It may not imply a maximized TSS
We do not know producer surplus

maximized TSS
We do not know producer surplus

我們不知道生產者盈餘
Case 4: When PS is maximized,
It may not imply a maximized TSS
We do not know Consumer surplus 
案例四：當生產者盈餘最大化時，
它可能並不意味著總社會盈餘最大化
我們不知道消費者盈餘

11.9 Externalities By Definitions Concept Corner: 
1.Social benefit = marginal private cost + marginal external cost T / F
     社會利益 = 邊際私人成本 + 邊際界外成本
∵ 
2.Negative externality implies over-production T / F
     負面界外效應意味著生產過剩
∵ 
3.When marginal social cost is larger than marginal private cost, it implies there is an external cost T / F
當邊際社會成本大於邊際私人成本時，意味著存在界外成本                              
∵ 
4.When marginal social cost is equal to marginal private cost, it implies there is no inefficiencyT / F當邊際社會成本等於邊際私人成本時，意味著不存在低效率
∵ 
5.Externalities exists when one person’s action affects other parties without paying compensation T / F
     當一個人的行為影響到其他方而沒有支付補償時，便會存在界外效應。
∵ 
6.When marginal social benefit is smaller than marginal social cost, harmful externality ex

than marginal social cost, harmful externality existsT / F
     當邊際社會利益小於邊際社會成本時，負面界外效應存在。
∵ 
7.Externalities may still exist when one person’s action affects other parties with paying compensation T / F
     當一個人的行為影響到其他人並支付賠償時，界外效應可能仍然存在。              
∵ 
8.Social Benefit = Private Benefit + External BenefitT / F
     社會利益 = 私人利益 + 界外利益
∵

11.11Externalities Question LQ Demo界外效應長題目框架
Example Question:
In Mong Kok, there are many street performers presenting acrobat, singing, magic and dancing. Most of them perform in the Shi Yeung Choi Street South where many tourists and pedestrian are attracted to gather. Some snack shops nearby found their business sharply increases as they are located near these preforming areas. 
(a)Based on the above information, explain, in terms of externality, how the street performers may result in inefficiency. (4)
(b)How may such a problem if inefficiency by relieved by market?(2)
Suggest Answer:
(a)
Positive Externality 
Sna

?(2)
Suggest Answer:
(a)
Positive Externality 
Snack shops near the performing grounds enjoy an increase in total revenue due to the street-performers’ action without compensation to the street performers. 
So external benefit exists and marginal social benefit is greater than marginal social cost.
The number of street performers near the snack shops is lower than that required by the efficiency level. 
(b)
The snack shops may pay the street performers to extend the performing time. 
Or
The street performers may charge the snack shops for extending the performing time near them. 
11.11Externalities Question LQ Demo界外效應長題目框架
例題:
在旺角，很多街頭表演者正在表演雜技、唱歌、魔術和跳舞。他們大部分都聚集在充滿遊客和路人、人山人海的西洋菜街。一些附近的零食店鋪發現自己的生意在表演期間急速上升。
(a) 根據上述資料，運用界外效應概念，解釋街頭表演者們如何導致了無效率？        (4)
(b)如果上述問題導致無效率，試問如何透過市場解決呢？                          (2)
建議答案：
甲
正面界外效應 
表演場地附近的小吃店因街頭表演者的行為而增加了總收入，而無需向街頭表演者提供補償。
因此界外利益存在，並且邊際社會利益大於邊際社會成本。
小吃店附近的街頭藝人數量低於效率水平。
乙
小吃店可向街頭表演者支付費用延長演出時間。 
或
街頭表演者可向附近的小吃店收取延長表演時間的費用。
11.11Externalities Question LQ Demo界外效應長題目框

時間的費用。
11.11Externalities Question LQ Demo界外效應長題目框架
2015 DSE 
Negative externality / divergence between private and social costs
When the public transportation system is overcrowded (i.e. at full capacity), any additional passenger using the system would increase the time cost for other passengers without having to compensate them for this extra cost is now higher than marginal social benefit, the number of passengers using the system would exceed its efficient level.
負面界外影響/私人成本與社會成本分歧。
當公共交通工具過份擠迫（即達至飽和），任何額外的乘客都會令其他乘客的時間成本上升，卻沒有對這額外成本作出補償（意味著私人成本與社會成本存在分歧）。由於邊際社會成本大於邊際社會利益，在公共交通的乘客的數量高於有效率的水平。
2017 DSE 
Positive externality. Restaurants in remote area enjoy an increase in total revenue due to the game developer’s action without compensation to the game developer. So external benefit exists and marginal social benefit is greater than marginal social cost. The number of existing hotspots near the restaurants is lower than that required by the efficiency level.
正面界外影響。偏遠地區的餐廳因遊戲發展商所選熱點的位置得益，卻沒有補償發展商。故此出現了界外利益

.
正面界外影響。偏遠地區的餐廳因遊戲發展商所選熱點的位置得益，卻沒有補償發展商。故此出現了界外利益，而邊際社會利益大於邊際社會成本。這些餐廳附近的現有熱點數目是低於有效率水平。
2016 DSE 
There may be negative externality (external cost is involved). Taking photos may disturb other people in the restaurants/ sharing the photos in the social media may disclose the design of dishes which may have an undesirable effect on the revenue of the restaurants, while the photo-takers have not compensated for the action. So external cost exists and marginal social cost is greater than marginal social benefit. The number of photo-taking-and sharing behaviour in the restaurants exceeds the efficiency level.
在餐廳拍照可能會騷擾他人/在社交媒體分享圖片可能會透露了食品的設計。這可能對餐廳的利益/利潤有負面的影響，但拍照者卻沒有對其影響作出（金錢或其他方面的）補償。這拍照並分享的行為可能造成負面界外效應（涉及界外利益）。

Restriction or removal

11.12Solution to Externalities界外效應的解決方案
Resolving Externalities – Market solution解決界外效應—市場解決方案
Condition: well-defined property right (of permits) 條件：明確的產權（許可證）
Pollution Permit 排污許可證

(of permits) 條件：明確的產權（許可證）
Pollution Permit 排污許可證
-Government can grant pollution permits, which can trade in the market, to some producers
Producers have to pay to buy pollution permits  -MP1 to MP2
Reduce production to efficient level
OR
Firm A has the right to pollute, Firm B affected by the pollution, Firm B will pay A, and ask Firm A to reduce production when (MPB - MPC) < compensation from B
OR
Firm B has right not to allow Firm A to pollute, Firm A will pay B for increase pollution when (MPB - MPC) to A > compensation to B 
生產者必須付費購買污染許可證 
-MP1 to MP2
將生產減少到有效率水平
或
A公司有權污染，B公司受污染影響，B公司支付A費用，並要求A公司減產，直至(MPB - MPC) < B公司的補償時
   或
公司 B 有權不允許公司 A 污染，直至 (MPB - MPC)  A > 補償給 B 時，公司 A 將支付給 B 以進行污染
Internalization / Self-restraint
The firm will find their own ways to reduce externalities 
(e.g. A will install equipment to reduce pollution if he finds it is less costly than compensation to B)
內化/自我約束
公司將找到自己的方法來減少界外效應
（例：如果 A 發現成本低於補償給 B，他將安裝減少污染的設備）
Integration
Integration of A and B, they will maximize their

n
Integration of A and B, they will maximize their total gain
External cost will internalize to private cost
結合/合併
整合A和B，便能最大化他們的總利益
外部成本將內部化為私人成本
11.13Limitation of Resolving Externalities解決界外效應的局限
Limitation of solution
*Both market solution and government solution can be costly and may not work 
解決方案的局限
*市場和政府解決方案都並非十全十美，有成本高以及不可行的風險
Market Solution 
Cost of pricing, making and enforcing contract 
市場解決方案
定價、訂立和執行合同的成本
Government Solution 
cost of making policy and enforcing law
E.g.
Non-profit making and lack of incentives to achieve efficiency 
Government solution create other externalities 
政府解決方案
制定政策和執行法律的成本
例：
非營利性，缺乏實現效率的激勵
政府解決方案會產生其他界外效應
*Also, due to imperfect information, it is difficult or impossible to measure MEC
*When transaction cost (of resolving) > Deadweight loss
Do nothing = Efficient 
*此外，由於信息不完全，很難或不可能衡量 MEC
*當交易成本（解決）> 無淨損失
什麼都不做 = 有效率

State TWO functions of price in market economy.              (4)
Rationing function: Prices help to distribute goods to us

ng function: Prices help to distribute goods to users with the highest value for the goods. Under the price system, people who are willing and able to pay the price get the scarce goods.(2)
Allocative function: The price mechanism or the “invisible hand” determines the resource allocation in a market economy. When the price of a good increases (decreases), more (fewer) resources are allocated to produce the good. (2)
陳述價格在市場經濟中的兩個作用。                           (4)
配給功能：價格有助於將商品分發給願意付出最高價值的用戶。在此價格體系下，願意並且能夠支付價格的人獲得稀缺的商品。                                                (2)
分配功能：此價格機制或「無形的手」決定了市場經濟中的資源配置。當一種商品的價格上漲（下跌）時，分配更多（更少）的資源來生產該商品。                          (2)

∵ 
5.Allocative function states t

6.When there is a drop in price, producers will allocate more resource to produce that good according to the allocative function T / F

Type 3: Function of price
第三類：價格的作用
1.Rationing function: Prices help to distribute goods to users with the highest value for the goods. Under the price system, people who are willing and able to pay the price get the scarce goods.
配給功能：價格有助於將商品分發給對商品價值最高的用戶。在此價格體系下，願意並且有能力支付價格的人獲得稀缺的商品。
2.Allocative function: The price mechanism determines the resource allocation in a mark

anism determines the resource allocation in a market economy. When the price of a good increases (decreases), more (fewer) resources are allocated to produce the good. 
分配功能：此價格機制決定了市場經濟中的資源配置。當一種商品的價格上漲（下跌）時，分配更多（更少）的資源來生產該商品。

2017DSE LQ4
Pokémon Go is a popular game for which gamers need to move around different places with their smartphones to catch the cyber-pets. Its developer has pla

nes to catch the cyber-pets. Its developer has placed hotspots in different areas where many gamers are attracted to gather. Some restaurants in remote areas found their business sharply increased as they are located near these hotspots.
(a)Based on the above information, explain, in terms of externality, how the placing of the hotspots may result in inefficiency. (3)
(b)How may such a problem of inefficiency be relieved by market?(2)
「 Pokémon Go」是一款熱門遊戲，玩家需攜帶智能手機前往不同的地點捕捉虛擬寵物。遊戲發展商在不同地區放置熱點，而這些熱點會吸引很多玩家聚集。一些在偏遠地區的餐廳發現生意急升，原因是它們位處這些熱點附近。
(a) 根據上述資料，以界外影響為依據，解釋放置熱點如何可能導致缺乏效率。        
(b)市場如何可以減輕這缺乏效率的問題？                                     
_______________________________________________________________________________________
_______________________________________________________________________________________
_______________________________________________________________________________________
_______________________________________________________________________________________
_______________________

____________________
_______________________________________________________________________________________
Marking Scheme: 
(a)Positive externality. Restaurants in remote area enjoy an increase in total revenue due to the game developer’s action without compensation to the game developer. So external benefit exists and marginal social benefit is greater than marginal social cost. The number of existing hotspots near the restaurants is lower than that required by the efficiency level.(3)
(b)The restaurants may pay the game developer to increase the hotspots nearby.
or
The game developer may charge the restaurants for placing more hotspots near them. (2)
(a)正向界外影響。偏遠地區的餐廳因遊戲發展商所選熱點的位置利益，卻沒有補償發展商。故此出現了界外利益，
而邊際社會利益大於邊際社會成本。這些餐廳附近的現有熱點數目是低於效率水平。                                                                           
(b)餐廳可付款予遊戲發展商以增加其附近的熱點。   或
   遊戲發展商可能向這些餐廳收費，以便在其附近放置更多熱點。

Gini Coefficient堅尼系數/基尼系數
Gini Coefficient is to measure the disparity between low-income group and high income group.
Gini Coefficient is between 0 to 1,
Country B: 0 (Absolute Income Equality)
Country C: 1 (Complete Income Disparity)
While 0 is the most even and 1 is the most uneven
堅尼系數的作用是用來衡量低收入組別人士和高收入組別人士之間的差距。
堅尼系數在0到1之間,
B 國：0（絕對收入平等）
C 國：1（完全收入差距）
所以0 是最平均的，1 是最不平均的
Indicating Gini Coefficient

equality threshold alert line,

表示堅尼系數

12.6 Gini Coefficient Concept Corner: 
1.In general, Gini Coefficient is between 0 to 1 T / F
    一般來說，堅尼系數在0到1之間
∵ 
2.The change in Gini Coefficient implies change in actual income T / F
    堅尼系數的變化意味著實際收入的變化
∵
3.Higher Gini Coefficient implies a worser income distribution T / F
    較高的堅尼系數意味著較差的收入分佈
∵
4.Lowe

distribution T / F
    較高的堅尼系數意味著較差的收入分佈
∵
4.Lower Gini Coefficient implies a worser income distribution T / F
    較低的堅尼系數意味著較差的收入分佈
∵
5.45-degree Lorenz Curve implies the Gini Coefficient is equal to 1 T / F
    45 度洛倫茨曲線意味著堅尼系數等於 1
∵
6.90-degree Lorenz Curve implies the Gini Coefficient is equal to 1 T / F
    90 度洛倫茨曲線意味著堅尼系數等於 1
∵
7.When the ratio of the area between the 45-degree line and the Lorenz curve is divided by the total area below the 45-degree line (   ), the calculated value equals to Gini Coefficient.            T / F
45度線與洛倫茨曲線之間的面積除以45度線以下的總面積(   )，得出的比例數據等於堅尼系數                                               
∵
8.It is impossible for Lorenz curve to be above the 45-degree line.T / F
    洛倫茨曲線不可能在 45 度線以上。
∵
9.Living standard will be better if the Gini coefficient drops T / F
    當堅尼系數下降，生活水平會更好。
∵
10.If Gini Coefficient is equal to 0, it implies absolute income equality T / F
    如果堅尼系數等於0，意味著收入絕對平等
∵
ANS: TFTFF TTTFT
12.7Limitation of Measuring Income Inequality衡量收入不平等的局限
Limitation局限
Diff

ring Income Inequality衡量收入不平等的局限
Limitation局限
Different household sizes
Households earning the same amount of income may have different household size
家庭規模不同
收入相同的家庭可能有不同的家庭人數
Difficult to collect income data
Some households may conceal income data
(E.g. people may hide part of their income sources)
難以採集收入數據
一些家庭可能會隱瞞收入數據
（例如，人們可能隱瞞部分的收入來源）
Different definitions of income
Some people may only count income from full-time job, some people may count income from transfer payment or from investment 
(E.g. actual income and disposable income)
收入定義不同
有些人可能只計算全職工作的收入，有些人可能會計算來自轉移支付或來自投資的收入
（例如實際收入和可支配收入）)
Ignore Lifetime Income
Some jobs start with low income and will increase over time 
(E.g. accountants, management trainees,  bankers, etc…)
忽略終生收入
有些工作開始時收入很低，但會隨著時間的推移而增加
（例如會計師、管理培訓生、銀行家等……）
Ignore government policy
Some countries may have a better government policy 
(E.g. unemployment benefit, CSSA, transport allowance, etc…)
忽略政府政策
一些國家可能有更好的政府政策
(例如失業金、綜援、交通津貼等…)
12.8Sources of Income Inequality收入不平等的根源
Differe

)
12.8Sources of Income Inequality收入不平等的根源
Different inborn abilities
People with a higher IQ / better appearance are usually get a higher salary in the job market
(E.g. Intelligence, appearance will affect income)
先天能力不同
智商更高 / 外貌更好的人通常在就業市場上獲得更高的收入
（例如智力、外貌會影響收入）
Different human capital / capital asset
People with more human capital are tends to have a higher salary since they have more experience, better system.
(E.g. Spend time and money to acquire better education  higher income)
不同的人力資本 / 資本資產
擁有更多人力資本的人往往有更高的收入，因為他們有更多的經驗，更好的資本。
（例如：花時間和金錢獲得更好的教育  更高的收入）
Compensation differentials
People who are willing to have a more dangerous jobs are tend to have a higher salary paid.
(E.g. Leisure jobs  usually lower income, Dangerous jobs  usually higher income)
補償差異
願意從事更危險工作的人往往會獲得更高的收入。
（例如，休閒工作  通常收入較低，危險工作  通常收入較高）
Discrimination
In different market / economies, there are many different kinds of discrimination, such as Asian usually get a lower paid than other foreigners in NBA. 
Some job markets may only hir

foreigners in NBA. 
Some job markets may only hire females while some job markets may only hire males.
(E.g. Sex discrimination / Racial discrimination)
歧視
在不同的市場 / 經濟體中，存在著多種不同的歧視，比如亞洲人在 NBA 中的收入通常低於其他外國人。
一些就業市場可能只僱用女性，而一些就業市場可能只僱用男性。
（例如性別歧視 / 種族歧視）
Geographical difference
In USA, the average salary is higher than in Africa since their price level and living standard is not the same.
(E.g. Demand and supply of the same type of worker are different in different region, China  cheap labor)
地域差異
在美國，平均收入比非洲高，因為他們的物價水平和生活水平不一樣。
（例如，同一類型工人的需求和供應在不同地區是不同的，中國  廉價勞動力）

    收入均等化與機會均等化是對立的

    一項政策只能提高收入或增加機會
∵

    機會均等化意味著增加他們未來的收入賺取能力

    分配固定數額的現金補貼並不能帶來更好的收入分佈

    延長免費教育的時間有助於更好的機會均等化
∵

12.11Equalizing Income and Opportunity Demo收入和機會均等化框架
Case 1: To extend the free education to 15 years
Equalizing Opportunities:
Free education for longer years means that the poor are able to receive more education and improve their productivity and hence income-earning power in the future.
案例一：免費教育延長至15年
機會均等化：
更長時間的免費教育意味著低收入組別人士能夠接受更多的教育並提高他們的生產力，從而提高他們未來提高收入的能力。
Case 2: To provide unemployment benefit
Equalizing Income:
More welfare payments to the unemployed could help to reduce the income inequality between the employed (rich) and the unemployed (poor)
案例二：提供失業救濟金
收入均等化：
向失業者提供更多福利可能有助於減少就業者（富人）和失業者（窮人）之間的收入不平等
Case 3: $6,000 Cash sharing
Equalizing Income:
The $6,000 results in a higher percentage increase in the income of the poor
Equalizing Opportunities:
It does not help equalizing opportunities. Relative to the rich, the poor do not get more resources to improve their productivity / increase future income
案例 3：$6,000 現金分享
收入均等化：
6,000元導致窮人的收入增加百分比更高
機會均等化：
它無助於機會均等化。相對於富人，窮人沒有獲得更多資源來提高生

窮人的收入增加百分比更高
機會均等化：
它無助於機會均等化。相對於富人，窮人沒有獲得更多資源來提高生產力 / 增加未來收入
12.11Equalizing Income and Opportunity Demo收入和機會均等化框架
Case 4: Provide community-based primary care services, targeting the elderly, low-income individuals and patients with chronic diseases.
Equalizing Income:
Basic medical service act like a transfer or subsidy-in-kind, enjoyed mainly by the low-income group; The high-income group may choose not to “queue up” for such medical benefits and turn to private medical services instead. 
案例 4：提供以社區為基礎的初級保健服務，針對老年人、低收入組別人士和慢性病患者。
收入均等化：
基本醫療服務作為轉移支付或實物補貼，主要由低收入組別人士享受；高收入組別人士可以選擇不“排隊”享受此類醫療福利，轉而尋求私人醫療服務。
Case 5: Raising the fee of the emergency car service
Equalizing Income:
After the fee raise, the poor may no longer be able to afford the fee and thus be deprived of the opportunity to enjoy the medical services. Equity may be worsened as the poor cannot enjoy the transfer / subsidy while the rich can still use the service.
案例五：提高急救車服務費
收入均等化：
加價後，窮人可能再也負擔不起費用，從而失去享受醫療服務的機會。公平性可能會惡化，因為窮人無法享受轉移 / 補貼，而富人仍然可以

起費用，從而失去享受醫療服務的機會。公平性可能會惡化，因為窮人無法享受轉移 / 補貼，而富人仍然可以使用該服務。
12.11Equalizing Income and Opportunity Demo收入和機會均等化框架
Case 6: Introduce a per-unit subsidy to the education services of private universities
Equalizing Opportunity:
Subsidizing education is a measure to equalize opportunities, so the poor will not be deprived from university education because of their background. Education also improves their future income, thus reducing income inequality over generations.
案例 6：按單位設立私立大學的教育服務補貼
機會均等化：
資助教育是一種機會均等化的措施，這樣窮人就不會因為出身而被剝奪接受大學教育的權利。教育還可以提高他們未來的收入，從而減少幾代人的收入不平等。
Case 7: A government introduces an allowance for low-income working families with the following objectives:
(1)Encourages members of low-income families to remain employed.
(2)Offers support for children from low-income families so as to promote upward mobility.
Equalizing Income:
The allowance raises the cost of being unemployed. Therefore, more workers from low-income families will remain employed.
Equalizing Opportunity:
An additional allowance will

alizing Opportunity:
An additional allowance will be provided for each child. Hence, children from low-income families may have more educational opportunities.
The extra income may be spent on daily necessities rather than education. The children may not have more opportunities to move upwards.
案例 7：政府為低收入工薪家庭提供津貼，
目標如下：
(1)鼓勵低收入家庭成員繼續就業。
(2)支援低收入家庭子女，促進向上流動
收入均等化：
津貼增加了失業的成本。因此，更多來自低收入家庭的工人將繼續就業。
機會均等化：
將為每個孩子提供額外津貼。因此，來自低收入家庭的孩子可能有更多的教育機會。
額外的收入可能會花在生活必需品上，而不是教育上。孩子們可能沒有更多的機會向上流社會移動。

13.4 Gross Domestic Product (GDP) 國內生產總值
Definition: Total value of all final product produced by resident producing unit of an economy in a specific period of time
Final product: Current production is involved + goods or service + FINAL
定義：一個經濟體的常住生產單位在特定時期內生產的所有最終產品的總價值
最終產品：涉及當前生產 + 商品或服務 + 最終
Items EXCLUDED in national income calculation 不應包括 :
1.    Capital Gain – increase in the value of an asset 
Eg: The price of the property increases from $2M to $3M
Does not imply any change in production value
2.    Second-hand goods 
Resale of existing second-hand goods are not currently
produced 
Their values have been counted as national income in the first time (in the past)
Avoid double counting
3.    Past inventories 
Products being produced before this year 
Current production is not involved 
Should be counted at the producing year
4.     Non-marketed goods and services
Without market transaction or market transaction with no official record (in general)
5.

action with no official record (in general)
5.    Transfer payment 
Eg: Comprehensive Social Security Assistance (CSSA), Transport Subsidy, unemployment benefit provided by government
6.    Unreported transaction/ illegal transaction 
Eg: Private tutor service, mum cooks for the family (compared with a domestic helper)
Eg: Production and selling of drugs
7.    Contaminated goods
Does not have any market value
8.    Transaction of financial assets – shares, bonds and loans
Commission (to stock agent) and transaction levies involved in the transaction of financial assets are counted  service provided and produced
9.    Intermediate products
Trump bakes a sausage roll and sells to President Xi for $100
Only the value of the final product (sausage roll) will be counted in GDP : $100
The value of intermediate product (sausage, flour, butter) will not be counted. Avoid double counting

13.13 Limitation of using National Income Statistics 國民收入數據的限制

Problem of general price level
A country with a high general price level may have high Nominal GDP
But the high Nominal GDP does not imply the country has a high output
Real GDP
Size of population
A country with a high population may have a h

tion
A country with a high population may have a high GDP
But the per-capita GDP may not be high
Per-capita GDP
Non-marketed / Unreported / Illegal transaction
Not included in GDP
There may have large amount of it
Quality of goods and services
GDP cannot reflect the quality of goods and services
Country A may have a higher GDP while the quality of products is very low
  Country B may have a lower GDP while the quality of products is very good
  Higher GDP ≠ Better Quality of goods / services
Composition of output
(country with more consumer goods) 
As more goods can be consumed now, there is a high current living standard
(country with more producer goods) 
As they can produce more goods to consume in future, there is a high future living standard
Income Distribution
If the income distribution is uneven, the country with a high GDP does not imply there is a high living standard in that country
Higher GDP ≠ Better Income Distribution 
Social Problem
If there is a serious social problem (political/ crime rate/

a serious social problem (political/ crime rate/ pollution), the country with a high GDP does not imply there is a high living standard in that country
Higher GDP ≠ Fewer Social Problem
Leisure
In a high GDP country, if the workers need to work a longer working hour, they may have less leisure time, so the high GDP does not imply there is a high living standard
Higher GDP ≠ More Leisure Time
Working Condition
In a high GDP country, if the workers need to work under a poor working environment, it will affect their health condition, so the high GDP does not imply there is a high living standard
Higher GDP ≠ Better Working Condition

13.14 Magnitude of GDP 本地生產總值的量化
In various situations, 
The total value of transactions in an economy will be different (larger / smaller) from that in GDP. The reasons can be:
Transactions of second-hand goods
Some transactions are the transfer of ownership (e.g.: people buy bonds)
Transactions of imported goods
Transactions of intermediate goods
 The above ‘transactions’ all included in the
       calculation of total value of transactions but
       not GDP!!
The total spending of consumers in an economy will be larger from that in the increase in private consumption expenditure (C). The reasons can be:
Spending on

n expenditure (C). The reasons can be:
Spending on second-hand goods
Spending on investment (e.g.: people buy flat)
Spending included down payment for goods produced in future years (e.g.: You used $100 to buy ten $10 gift coupons in McDonald but you didn’t use them in that year)
The above ‘spendings’ are neither included in C nor GDP!!
The sales revenue of a company is larger than its contribution to the GDP of its economy / The decrease in the sales revenue of a company is larger than its decrease in the part of the GDP contributed to its economy
The reasons can be:
Not all factor inputs used in production are made/originated in the economy, some of them are imported materials
Not all factor inputs used in production are made/originated in the company, some of them were brought from other companies
Some goods sold in that year were not produced in the current year, some of them were the inventories
The sales revenue of a company is smaller than its contribution to the GDP of its economy or The decrease in t

ion to the GDP of its economy or The decrease in the sales revenue of a company is smaller than its decrease in the part of the GDP contributed to its economy 
The reason is that some goods are produced and unsold in the current year.

在各種情況下， 
1. 一個經濟體中交易的總價值將不同於（大於 / 小於）GDP中的交易總價值。原因可能是：
二手貨交易 
有些交易是所有權的轉移（例如：人們購買債券） 
進口貨物的交易 
中間產品(半成品)的交易 
以上“交易”全部計入交易總值，不計入生產總值！！
2. 一個經濟體消費者的總支出將大於私人消費支出的增加（C）。原因可能是：
二手貨品消費 
投資支出（例如：人們為了生活而購買房屋） 
支出包括未來幾年生產的商品的預前付款（例如：您用100元在麥當勞購買了10張10元的禮券，但你在該年沒有使用） 
以上‘支出’不計入C亦不計入GDP！！
3. 公司銷售收入大於其對GDP的貢獻或者企業銷售收入下降幅度大於其對GDP貢獻的下降幅度。
原因可能是： 
(a) 並非生產中使用的所有要素投入都是在該經濟體系中製造的，其中一些是進口材料。
(b) 並非所有用於生產

並非生產中使用的所有要素投入都是在該經濟體系中製造的，其中一些是進口材料。
(b) 並非所有用於生產的要素投入都是在公司製造的，其中一些是從其他公司帶來的。 
(c) 當年銷售的部分商品非當年生產，部分可能為存貨。
4. 公司銷售收入小於其對經濟GDP的貢獻或者公司銷售收入的下降幅度小於其對GDP貢獻率的下降幅度。
原因是部分商品於當年生產但於當年未售出。

一座建築的生產價值是100萬，解釋為什麼其對GDP的貢獻小於100萬。

(a)***Suppose a football club in Hong Kong hired a famous football player from Brazil as the coach for a 2-month course for kids. He received $8 million as his salary and returned to Brazil afterwards. However, the enrolment of the course was poor and the revenue from the course was $3 million only. What is the effect of organising the above course on each of the following items? Explain.
(i) Hong Kong’s gross domestic product (GDP)(2)
(ii) Hong Kong’s gross national product (GNP)(3)
(a)   假設香港某球會聘請了一位巴西著名足球員擔任為期兩個月的兒童足球班教練，他收取了八百萬元的薪金，其後
返回巴西。不過，足球班的收生欠佳，學費收入只有三百萬元。舉辦上述足球班對下列各項有什麼影響？試加以解釋。
(i)香港的本地生產總值 (GDP)(2)
(ii)香港的本地居民生產總值 (GNP)(3)
______________________________________________________________________________

)
      香港的本地生產總值會上升三百萬元，因為這課程是常住生產單位本年度的生產，該課程的價值會計入本地生產總值內。(2)
(a)(ii) Hong Kong’s GNP would decrease by 5 million, as change in GNP = change in GDP (+ 3 million) + change in net income from abroad (- 8 million). As the Brazilian coach is NOT a HK resident, the 8 million he received would be counted as income outflow and enter as a negative item in HK’s national income account. (3)
香港的本地居民生產總值會下降5百萬元，因為GNP的轉變 = GDP的轉變 (+3百萬元) + 海外收入淨值NIFA的轉變 (-8百萬元)。因為該巴西球員不是本地居民，故該8百萬收入會計算成收入流出，在本港的國民收入計算內是須要扣減的。(3)

醫療服務是人類

. Their contribution to GDP, computed using market price, would thus higher than $45. /
because the public services which are not sold at the market price will be counted using factor cost in the GDP, which is higher than $45. (2)

14.4Formula of Employment & Unemployment 就業及失業的公式 Concept Corner
1.Unemployment = employment – underemployment
失業 = 就業 – 就業不足    T / F

∵

就業率 = 就業人口 ÷ 勞動人口 T / F
∵

失業率 = 勞動人口 – 失業人口T / F
∵
7.Total population x labour force participation rate = employment
總人口x 勞動人口參與率 = 就業人口 T / F
∵

總人口x 勞動人口參與率 = 就業人口 + 失業人口 T / F

勞動力 = 就業 + 失

ent + unemployment + under employment

14.5Cost of Unemployment Concept Corner: 
1.Society and government may suffer loss when there is unemployment
當有失業的時候，社會和政府可能會承受損失   T / F

2.Increase in government expenditure due to social disorder is a cost to government
社會不穩導致的政府支出增加是對於政府的代價 T / F
∵
3.Increase in financial burden such as providing the unemployment benef

al burden such as providing the unemployment benefit is a cost to government 
增加財政負擔，例如提供失業救濟金，是對於政府的代價T / F
∵
4.Social disorder is one of the cost of unemployment to society 
社會不穩是失業對於社會的其中一個的代價T / F
∵
5.Increase in crime rate is one of the cost of unemployment to society
犯罪率上升是對於社會的其中一個失業的代價 T / F
∵
6.Being unemployed may lead to both lower living standard and psychological problem
失業時可能會同時導致較低的生活水平和心理問題T / F
∵
7.Loss of real output / real national income is one of the cost of unemployment to government
實質產出 / 實質國民收入的損失是對於政府的其中一個失業的代價 T / F
∵
*8.Unemployment will lead to a lower potential output
失業會減少潛在產出 T / F
∵
*.Increase in employment rate will lead to larger full employment
失業率上升會增加充分就業 T / F
∵

14.6Inflation & Deflation Concept Corner: 
1.Once and for all increase in price level may be considered as inflation 
一次性的物價水平上升可能被視為通脹T / F
∵
2.Inflation may exist in barter economy 
通脹可以在以物易物經濟體中出現T / F
∵
3.Mastery economics raise the tuition fee will be considered as inflation 
Mastery Economics 提高學費會被視為通脹  T / F
∵
4.Impose general sales tax will lead to inflation 
實施一般銷售稅會引致通脹T / F
∵
5.Even most of the people are willing to pay a higher price, inflation may not occur
即便大部分人都願意付出更高的價錢，通脹也可能不會發生T / F
∵
6.Inflation may still exist even if some of the goods have a drop in price
即使有些貨品的價格下降，通脹也可能存在T / F
∵
7.A persistent increase in general price level of most of the goods and services imply inflation 
大部分貨品及服務的一般物價水平的持續上升意味通脹T / F
∵
8.A persistent increase in general price level of all of the goods and services imply inflation 
所有貨品及服務的一般物價水平的持續上升意味通脹T / F

14.8Indicators Measuring Change in Price Level
To measure Inflation and Deflation, we have
different indicators to accomplish while we focus to two main indicators in this chapter - Consumer Price Index (CPI) and GDP Deflator.
為量度通脹及通縮，我們有不同的指標，而在此課題中主要以其中兩大指標為重點 - 消費物價指數 (CPI) 和本地生產總值平減物價指數 (GDP平減物價指數)
Consumer Price Index (CPI)
Measure of the average change over time in the prices paid by consumers for a basket of consumer goods and services
GDP Deflator
Measures the price change in all types of goods and services (both consumer goods and producer goods) included in GDP
消費物價指數 (CPI)
量度消費者所付費的一籃子消費者物品和服務在一段時間的價格變化情況
本地生產總值平減物價指數 (GDP平減物價指數)
量度本地生產總值計算內的所有種類的貨品和服務的價格變化情況
Consumer Price Index (CPI)
Fixed basket of good and weighting changes every 5 years
GDP Deflator
variable baskets of goods for each year.
消費物價指數 (CP

ariable baskets of goods for each year.
消費物價指數 (CPI)
消費物價指數計算一籃子的物品，比重每5年修訂
本地生產總值平減物價指數 (GDP平減物價指數)
每年的比重均不相同。
Consumer Price Index (CPI)
Focus on cost of living 
GDP Deflator
More comprehensive 
消費物價指數 (CPI)
集中在生活成本
本地生產總值平減物價指數 (GDP平減物價指數)
更全面
Important Reminder:
*** Both of them cannot reflect the change in quality*** Substitution effect 
 ***它們均不能反映出質素的變化*** 替代效應

∵

GDP平減物價指數同時計算消費者物品和生產者物品T / F
∵

消費物價指數的一籃子貨品每3年調整一次T / F
∵
5.GDP deflator focus mainly on cost of living
GDP平減物價指數主要集中於量度生活成本 T / F
∵
6.When CPI increases, GDP deflator must increase
當消費物價指數上升時，GDP平減物價指數必然上升 T / F
∵
7.When GDP deflator decreases, CPI must decrease

14.9Effect of Inflation Concept Corner: 
1.Purchasing power of money drop when there is inflation
貨幣的購買力在通脹時會下降 T / F
∵
2.If % increase in income is larger than % increase in general price level, the living standard tends to increase.
如果收入的%升幅大於一般物價水平的%升幅，生活水平趨向上升T / F
∵
3.When there is inflation, tax revenue tends to increase as more

s inflation, tax revenue tends to increase as more people fall into the tax net.
在通脹時，因為有更多人墮入税網，因此稅收收入趨向上升T / F
∵
4.People prefer to hold cash during inflation
人們偏好在通脹時持有現金 T / F
∵
5.Shares and bonds must be a better tool during inflation
股票和債券必然是在通脹時較佳的工具T / F
∵
6.People prefer current consumption when they expect inflation
當人們預料有通脹時，他們偏好於當前消費T / F
∵
7.Sellers prefer to hold a larger amount of inventory when they expect inflation
銷售者預料有通脹時，他們偏好於持有更多的存貨T / F
∵
8.The function of store of value will improve during deflation
貨幣的價值儲藏功能會在通縮時改善T / F
∵
ANS: TTTFF TTT 
14.10Fisher’s Equation 費沙方程式
應用該方程式:
筆記: 
Concept Drilling Examples:
Hilton borrow Carson for $100
Carson Inflation Rate                         3%
Carson Real Interest Rate               4%
Carson Nominal Interest Rate 3% + 4% =. .   7%
Case 1: There is 5% Inflation (unexpected inflation)
Carson’s expected inflation is 3% 
 there is unexpected inflation 2%
The nominal interest rate is set at 7% by Carson
Applying the Fisher’s Equation, N = I + R
The

son
Applying the Fisher’s Equation, N = I + R
The real interest rate is 7% - 5% = 2%
Carson expected to gain 4% but it turns out gain 2% only
Carson (Creditor) lose
∵ the purchasing power of money he received decrease 
Hilton (Debtor) gain 
∵ the purchasing power of money he paid decrease
Concept Drilling Examples:
Hilton借了Carson $100
Carson 預期的通脹               3%
Carson 想收的利率                     4%
Carson 要收 Hilton 的利率 3% + 4% =. .   7%
Case 1: 有5% 的通脹 (非預期通脹)
Carson預期的通脹是3% 
 有2%的非預期通脹
Carson計劃要收的利率是7%
應用費沙方程式，N = I + R
實質利率是7% - 5% = 2%
Carson預期會賺取4% 但最終只有2%
Carson (債權人) 損失
∵ 他所收取的貨幣的購買力減少了 
Hilton (債務人) 獲益
∵ 他所還付的貨幣的購買力減少了
Case 2: There is 1% Deflation (unexpected deflation)
Carson’s expected inflation is 3% 
 there is unexpected inflation -1% 
The Nominal Interest Rate is set at 7% by Carson
Applying the Fisher’s Equation, N = I + R
The Real Interest Rate is (7% - (-1%)) = 8%
Carson expected to gain 4% but it turns out gain 8%
Carson (Creditor) gain 
∵ the purchasing power of money he received increase

e purchasing power of money he received increase 
Hilton (Debtor) lose 
∵ the purchasing power of money he paid increase
Case 2: 有1%的通縮 (非預期通縮)
Carson預期的通脹是3% 
 有-1%的非預期通縮
 
Carson計劃要收的利率是7%
應用費沙方程式，N = I + R 
實質利率是(7% - (-1%)) = 8%
Carson預期會賺取4% 但最終有8%
Carson (債權人) 獲益
∵ 他所收取的貨幣的購買力增加了
Hilton (債務人) 損失
∵ 他所還付的貨幣的購買力增加了
Unexpected (Unanticipated) inflation / Deflation Redistribution Effect Concept Corner: 
1.Fully expected inflation will not involve redistributive effect of wealth 
已全部預期的通脹不會牽涉財富的再分配效應T / F
∵
2.Under unexpected inflation, lenders will lose 
非預期通脹時，貸款人會損失T / F
∵
3.Under unexpected inflation, debtors will lose 
非預期通脹時，負債者會損失              T / F
∵
4.Under unexpected deflation, creditors will gain  
非預期通縮時，債權人會獲益              T / F
∵
5.When the rate is floating rate, there is no redistribution effect 
當利率是浮動利率時，不會出現再分配效應             T / F
∵
6.When interest rate is indexed to the inflation rate, there is still be redistribution effect 
當利率與通脹率掛鉤時(指數化)，仍會出現再分配效應                                    T /

，仍會出現再分配效應                                    T / F
∵
ANS: TTFTT F

However, they are NOT expected to describe the mechanism / adjustment process.

 Students are expected to understand that a given event (change in any exogenous variable / factor / policy) MAY affect the AD and/or SRAS in the short run, and even affect the LRAS in the long run. In this case, students are expected to

Chapter 15 _ Aggregate Demand & Aggregate Supply Definition List
1. Why AD is downward sloping 
1. 為何總需求曲線是向下斜的
Wealth effect: As many of the assets in the economy

metadata.source: Ch15 Aggregate Demand and Aggregate Supply NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
alth effect: As many of the assets in the economy are denominated in nominal values, the higher the price level, the lower the purchasing power of these monetary assets. This reduces the wealth of the economy (in real terms). As a result, consumption decreases and the aggregate quantity of output demanded drops.
財富效應：
在經濟內很多資產以名義價值計算。當物價水平上升，這些貨幣資產的購買力下降，該經濟的財富（以實質價值計算）減少。結果，消費下降，實質產出下降。
Interest rate effect: As the price level rises, households and firms demand more money to finance their transactions. Given the fixed supply of money, the interest rate would rise. An increase in interest rate would cause a decline in investment and consumption and thus the aggregate quantity of output demanded.
利率效應：
當物價水平上升，住戶和公司需求更多貨幣為其交易融資。已知貨幣供應是固定的，利率會上升。利率上升會令投資和消費下降，實質產出下降。
Net exports effect: As the domestic price level rises, foreign-made goods become relatively cheaper so the quantity demanded of imports increases. The rise in the domestic price level also means that domestically produced goods are relatively more

metadata.source: Ch15 Aggregate Demand and Aggregate Supply NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
t domestically produced goods are relatively more expensive to foreign buyers, so the quantity demanded of exports decreases. When the volume of exports decreases and that of imports increases, net exports will decrease (if the price elasticities of demand for exports and/or imports are sufficiently high). As net exports are a component of aggregate expenditure, the aggregate quantity of output demanded would drop as net exports decline.
淨出口效應：
因本地物價水平上升，外國製造的物品相對變得較便宜，所以進口的需求量上升。此外，本地物價水平的上升亦意味著本地製造的物品對外國買家說相對較昂貴，出口的需求量下降。當出口量下降而進口量上升，淨出口會下降（若進出口物品的價格需求彈性夠高）。因為淨出口是總開支的一部分，淨出口下降會令實質產出下降。
2. Why SRAS is upward sloping 
3. 為何短期總供應曲線是向右上斜的
When the price level increases, the adjustment of input prices is imperfect (due to the longer contracts of inputs), so the cost of production in real terms has dropped. Quantities of output supplied will increase. Therefore, higher price level would result in higher output level.
當物價水平上升，投入的價格沒有完全/充分調整，（例如：因為生產要素合約的時間較長），所以實質生產成本（即名義成本除以一般物價水平）下降。廠商會運用更多要素投入增加產出。因此，短期總供應曲線是向右

metadata.source: Ch15 Aggregate Demand and Aggregate Supply NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
產成本（即名義成本除以一般物價水平）下降。廠商會運用更多要素投入增加產出。因此，短期總供應曲線是向右上斜的。物價水平上升會令產出水平上升。
3. Why LRAS is vertical 
3. 為何長期總供應曲線是垂直的
In long run, when general price level increases, aggregate output supplied will remain unchanged. The potential output is fixed by the production capacity and the technology. Both the input price and output price are fully flexible in long run, the quantity output supplied remains the same when the price level change.
長期而言，當一般物價水平上升時，總供應量將保持不變。潛在產出由生產能力和技術水平決定。長期而言，投入價格和產出價格都是充分調整的，當物價水平改變時，產出供應量保持不變。
4. Inflationary gap
4. 通脹（產出）差距
Short run equilibrium output level exceeds the potential output level (long run equilibrium output level)
短期均衡產出高於充分就業產出水平時，兩者的差距
5. Deflationary gap 
5. 通縮（產出）差距
Short run equilibrium output level below the potential output level (long run equilibrium output level)
短期均衡產出低於充分就業產出水平時，兩者的差距
6. Market adjustment mechanism / Market force 
6. 市場調節機制
The economy is facing an inflationary (output) gap. There would be an excess demand in the factor market, creating pressure for

metadata.source: Ch15 Aggregate Demand and Aggregate Supply NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
demand in the factor market, creating pressure for factor prices to adjust upward. As the costs of production would rise, short run aggregate supply (SRAS) would fall over time, thus restoring output to Yf in the long run.
該經濟面臨通脹（產出）差距。要素市場出現超額需求，對要素價格造成向上調整的壓力，故此生產成本會隨時間上升而短期總供應（SRAS）會隨時間下降，在長期會令產出回復至 Yf。
The economy is facing an deflationary (output) gap. There would be an excess supply in the factor market, creating pressure for factor prices to adjust downward. As the costs of production would decrease, short run aggregate supply (SRAS) would increase over time, thus restoring output to Yf in the long run.
該經濟面臨通縮（產出）差距。要素市場出現超額供應，對要素價格造成向下調整的壓力，故此生產成本會隨時間下降而短期總供應（SRAS）會隨時間上升，在長期會令產出回復至 Yf。
Bear in mind and recite
銘記並背誦

15.4Introduction to Aggregate Demand總需求的簡介
-Definitions 定義: 
Aggregate Demand (AD): The relationship between aggregate output demanded at different general price level for a given period of time, holding other factors constant
總需求：在其他因素不變的情況下，某時段內不同物價水平的總需求產出之間的關係
Aggregate Output Demand (AQD): The total market value of all goods and services demanded in an economy at a particular general price level for a given period of time
總需求產出：在某時間段內，在特定物價水平下，某經濟體所需求的所有商品和服務的總市場價值
Demand: shows the needs of the public of a specific good / service only
需求：僅顯示公眾對某特定商品 / 服務的需求
Aggregate Demand:shows the needs of the public of all types of goods and services
總需求：顯示公眾對各類商品和服務的需求
AD: Demand for 4 sectors總需求：4個向度的需求
1. Household:
Private Consumption Expenditure (C)
1. 家庭：
私人消費開支
2. Firms: 
Private Investment Expenditure (I)
***Government Investment Expenditure is included 
2. 廠商：
投資開支
***包括政府投資開支
3. Government:
Government Consumption Expenditure (G)
***Transfer Payment is exc

metadata.source: Ch15 Aggregate Demand and Aggregate Supply NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
umption Expenditure (G)
***Transfer Payment is excluded as current production is not involved
3. 政府：
政府消費開支
***由於轉移支付不涉及當時生產，故不包括
4. Foreign:
Export (X) – Import (M)
***Net Export
4. 對外：
出口 – 進口
***淨出口
∵ AD = C + I + G + X – M

15.5Shape of Aggregate Demand Curve總需求曲線的形狀
Reasons why Aggregate demand curve is downward sloping: 為何總需求曲線是向下斜的：
1. Wea

metadata.source: Ch15 Aggregate Demand and Aggregate Supply NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
nd curve is downward sloping: 為何總需求曲線是向下斜的：
1. Wealth Effect
When the general price level decrease, 
Purchasing power of money increase,
Real value of wealth increases,
Real private consumption expenditure increase,
Aggregate output demanded increase 
∴ AD is downward sloping 
1. 財富效應
當一般物價水平下降時，
貨幣的購買力上升，
財富的實質價值上升，
實質私人消費支出上升，
總需求產出上升。
∴總需求曲線向右下斜
2. Interest Rate Effect
When general price level decrease,
People demand less money for transaction 
(More savings and less borrowing) 
Interest rate decrease, 
(cost of borrowing decrease  borrowing increase)
Real consumption expenditure and 
real investment expenditure increase,
Aggregate output demanded increase.
∴ AD is downward sloping 
2. 利率效應
當一般物價水平下降時，
人們需要更少的貨幣為其交易融資，
（更多的儲蓄和更少的借貸）
利率下降，
（借貸成本減少  借貸上升）
實質私人消費支出和
實質投資支出上升，
總需求產量上升。 
∴總需求曲線向右下斜
3. Exchange Rate Effect / International Price Effect / Net Export Effect
When general price level decrease,
Relative price of export decrease and 
relative price of imports increase, 
Quantity demanded of export incr

metadata.source: Ch15 Aggregate Demand and Aggregate Supply NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
mports increase, 
Quantity demanded of export increase and 
quantity demanded of import decrease,
Quantity of Net export increase,
Aggregate output demanded increase.
∴ AD is downward sloping 
3. 淨出口效應
當一般物價水平下降時，
出口的相對價格下降，
進口的相對價格上漲，
出口的需求量上升及
進口的需求量下降，
淨出口量上升，
總需求產量增加。 
∴總需求曲線向右下斜

15.6Introduction to Aggregate Supply 總供應的簡介
Definitions:
Aggregate Supply (AS): The relationship between aggregate 
outp

metadata.source: Ch15 Aggregate Demand and Aggregate Supply NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
ply (AS): The relationship between aggregate 
output supplied of firms in an economy at different general 
price level for a given period of time, holding other factors
constant
總供應 (AS): 在某經濟體系中，廠商於不同的一般物價
水平下總產出供應量的關係。
Aggregate Output Supplied (AQS): The total market value of 
all goods and services supplied in an economy at a particular 
general price level for a given period of time
總產出供應量(AQS): 在某經濟體系中，於某特定物價水平下所供應的所有物品及服務之市場總值。
Supply: shows the supply of the public of a specific good / 
service only
供應: 顯示公眾對某一物品 / 服務的供應
Aggregate Supply: shows the supply of the all firms of all types of goods & services
*Only aggregate output supplied of all local firms is counted, change in supply of imported products won’t affect AS
總供應: 顯示所有廠商對所有類型的物品 & 服務的供應
*只有所有本地廠商的總產出供應量會被計算，進口物品的供應改變不會影響AS。
Aggregate Supply curve is divided in Short Run Aggregate Supply (SRAS) and Long Run Aggregate Supply (LRAS), the questions may ask you the effect in Short run or in Long Run separately.

15.15 Long Question Flow
Type 1: Shape of the curve
1.AD
Wealth effect: As many of the assets in the economy are denominated in nominal values, the higher the price level, the lower the purchasing power of money. This reduces the wealth of the economy (i

metadata.source: Ch15 Aggregate Demand and Aggregate Supply NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
f money. This reduces the wealth of the economy (in real terms). As a result, households and firms reduce their purchases of all goods and services and the real output drops. 
Interest rate effect: As the price level rise, households and firms demand more money to finance their transactions. Given the fixed supply of money, the interest rate would rise. An increase in interest rate would cause decline in investment and consumption and also the real output. 
Net export effect: As the domestica price level rises, foreign-made goods become relatively cheaper so the quantity demanded of imports increases. However, the rise in the domestic price level also means that domestic-made goods are relatively more expensive to foreign buyers so the quantity demanded of exports decreases. When the volumes of exports decrease and of imports increase, net exports will decrease (if the price-elasticities of demand for exports and/or imports are sufficiently high). Because net exports are a component of real GDP, the demand fo

metadata.source: Ch15 Aggregate Demand and Aggregate Supply NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
exports are a component of real GDP, the demand for real GDP declines as net exports decline. 
1.AD：
財富效應：在經濟內很多資產以名義價值計算。當物價水平上升，這些貨幣資產的購買力下降，該經濟的財富（以實質價值計算）減少。結果，消費下降，實質產出下降。
利率效應：當物價水平上升，住戶和公司需求更多貨幣為其交易融資。已知貨幣供應是固定的，利率會上升。利率上升會令投資和消費下降，實質產出下降。
淨出口效應：因本地物價水平上升，外國製造的物品相對變得較便宜，所以進口的需求量上升。此外，本地物價水平的上升亦意味著本地製造的物品對外國買家來說相對較昂貴，出口的需求量下降。當出口量下降而進口量上升，淨出口會下降（若進出口物品的價格需求彈性夠高）。因為淨出口是總開支的成分，淨出口下降會令實質產出下降。
2.SRAS
When the price level increases, the adjustment of input prices is imperfect (due to the longer contracts of inputs), so the cost of production in real terms has dropped. Quantities of output supplied will increase. Therefore, higher price level would result in higher output level. 
SRAS：
當物價水平上升，投入的價格沒有完全 / 充分調整，（例如：因為生產要素合約的時間較長），所以實質生產成本（即名義成本除以一般物價水平）下降。廠商會運用更多要素投入增加產出。因此，短期總供應曲線是向右上斜的。物價水平上升會令產出水平上升。
3.LRAS 
In long run, when general price level increases, aggregate output supplied will remain unchanged. The potential output is fixed by the production capacity and the technology. Both the input price and ou

metadata.source: Ch15 Aggregate Demand and Aggregate Supply NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
ty and the technology. Both the input price and output price are fully flexible in long run, the quantity output supplied remains the same when the price level change.
LRAS：
長期而言，當一般物價水平上升時，總供應量將保持不變。潛在產出由生產能力和技術水平決定。長期而言，投入價格和產出價格都是充分調整的，當物價水平改變時，產出供應量保持不變。

Type 3: Inflationary gap & deflationary gap with the market adjustment mechanism
Type 1 – Inflationary gap 
There is an inflationary gap. There is an excess demand in the factor market, creating pressure for factor prices to adjust upward, so that costs of production would increase over time and short run aggregate supply (SRAS) would falls over time, restoring output to Yf in the long run. 
第一類 — 通脹差距
該經濟面臨通脹（產出）差距。要素市場出現超額需求，對要素價格造成向上調整的壓力，故此生產成本會隨時間上升而短期總供應（SRAS）會隨時間下降，在長期會令產出回復至 Yf。
Type 2 – Deflationary gap 
There is a deflationary gap. There is an excess supply in the factor market, creating pressure for factor prices to adjust down

metadata.source: Ch15 Aggregate Demand and Aggregate Supply NOTE (CHECKED).docx

chunks.text:
creating pressure for factor prices to adjust downward, so that costs of production would decrease over time and short run aggregate supply (SRAS) would increases over time, restoring output to Yf in the long run.
類型 2 — 通縮缺口
該經濟面臨通縮（產出）差距。要素市場出現超額供應，對要素價格造成向下調整的壓力，故此生產成本會隨時間下降而短期總供應（SRAS）會隨時間上升，在長期會令產出回復至 Yf。

16.7Progressive, Proportional, Regressive Tax累進稅、比例稅、累退稅
Progressive Tax
累進稅
Tax rate increase when taxable income increase.
當應課稅收入增加時，稅率增加。
E.g. Salaries Tax – For person who pays according to marginal tax rate
例如：薪俸稅 – 適用於按邊際稅率繳稅的人
(2%  7%  12%  17%)
Proportional Tax
比例稅
Tax rate remain unchanged when taxable income increase.
當應課稅收入增加時，稅率不變。
E.g. Salaries Tax – For person who pays at a standard rate 
例如。薪俸稅 – 適用於按標準稅率繳稅的人士
(15%  15%  15%  15%)
Regressive Tax
累退稅
Tax rate decrease when taxable income increase.
當應課稅收入增加時，稅率降低。
E.g. Salaries Tax – For person who pays according to marginal tax rate 
例如。一般銷售稅 – 適用於按銷售稅稅率繳稅的人
(10%  7%  5%  2%)
Tax rate = (Tax Payment ÷ Taxable Income) x 100%
稅率=（納稅額 ÷ 應課稅收入）x 100%
REMARKS備註:
Progressive 
 Tax rate & Taxable income are positively related 
Regressive 
 Tax rate & Taxable income are negatively related
Proportional 
 Tax rate is constant when the taxable income↑/↓ 
累進
 稅率與應課稅收入正相關
累退
 稅率與應課稅收入負相關
比例
 應課稅收入↑/↓時稅率不變

↑/↓時稅率不變

***DSE TRAP‼!
Fixed amount on the value of goods or services does not mean proportional tax
商品或服務價值的固定數額並不意味著按比例徵稅
Case 1:
Impose $2 tax on apple’s value, 
If the apple priced $20, the taxpayer needs to pay = $2
For a poor person who has $100, $2 is 2% of his income
For Lee Ka Shing who has $10,000, $2 is only 0.02% of his income
The tax payment is fixed regardless of the taxable income
Tax rate decrease when taxable income increase
Regressive tax
